## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (with `RUN_DB_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true` + Postgres if API integration behavior changed)
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or env vars changed (`DEPLOYMENT.md`, `docs/*.md`)
